data.title: JSONL Session Logging to logfile/ Directory
data.rationale: SessionLogger class creates timestamped JSONL files (session_<ISO>.jsonl) under logfile/. One JSON object per line matches runtime protocol. Wired into event pipeline in index.ts. Per-invocation file: new SessionLogger each spawnRuntimeProcess call.

data.name: Session Logger
data.description: Creates logfile/ directory, opens write stream to timestamped JSONL file. log(event: AgentEvent) writes one JSON line. close() flushes and closes stream.
